events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a step order deviation vs. standard work sheet, observed via video + document (premier multimodal SEQ). Work is in-progress. This is a sequence violation. Since work is non-compliant with standard work, decision should be fail. Risk depends - step order deviation could lead to defects. Component condition: installed-defective may apply if components were installed out of sequence.

Let me construct the answer.
